summary: Livraison 1 backend+frontend tested against PROD https://smart-business-sigma.vercel.app. 17 backend tests run (8 pass, 7 fail, 2 skip). Frontend portfolio/catalog inspected. CRITICAL FINDING: Livraison 1 changes (categories CRUD PUT, portfolio status gagne/perdu/a_recontacter + lost_reason, opportunity agent_id persistence, agentName LEFT JOIN, nextMonthlyNumber, data-testid edit/delete-product, data-testid edit-portfolio) ARE PRESENT IN /app/api/index.ts + /app/src/pages/* source but ARE NOT DEPLOYED to Vercel production yet. All 7 backend failures and all frontend gaps trace to the same root cause: production runs PRE-Livraison-1 code.

critical.issue: Returns 404 'Cannot PUT /api/categories/:id' — route not deployed to prod (exists in /app/api/index.ts L369-378)
Response missing 'created_by' field — column or RETURNING clause not deployed
Response missing 'agentName' (LEFT JOIN users not deployed) AND missing 'lost_reason' column
agentId/agent_id NOT persisted/returned (req.user.uid not bound) — agent filter useless without it
500 'null value in column number of relation quotes violates not-null constraint' — nextMonthlyNumber fallback not deployed (helper exists in /app/api/index.ts L1098-1109)

minor.issue: Was required to recreate demo agents before testing; agents had been pruned from prod DB
Status 'a_recontacter' accepted and stored (free text), but 'lost_reason' field also dropped silently — likely DB column missing

ui_bugs.issue: Only 4 statuses shown (Nouveau/En suivi/En cours/Terminé). Missing: Gagné, Perdu, À recontacter.
Status <select> only has 4 options (nouveau/suivi/en_cours/termine). Missing: gagne, perdu, a_recontacter. No 'Motif' (lost_reason) field at all.
No data-testid='edit-product-<id>' or 'delete-product-<id>' attributes on the pencil/trash icon buttons (required for E2E testing).
No data-testid='edit-portfolio-<id>' attribute on edit pencil buttons.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot be tested via UI — UI has no 'perdu' option and no lost_reason field; backend also rejects lost_reason silently.
Frontend likely passes number=null; backend then 500s because nextMonthlyNumber not deployed.

action_items: DEPLOY /app/api/index.ts + /app/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx + /app/src/pages/Catalog.tsx to Vercel — push to the branch wired to smart-business-sigma.vercel.app and confirm build succeeds.

Verify Postgres Neon schema has columns: categories.created_by (text/uuid), portfolio_items.lost_reason (text), portfolio_items.agent_id (already exists), opportunities.agent_id (already exists). Run schema migrations from ensureDbInitialized if not auto-applied.
Re-run `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_livraison1.py -v` after deploy — expect 17/17 pass (or adjust monthly-number regex if format is DEV-YYYYMM-NNNN vs DEV-YYYY-MM-NNN).

Spec mismatch on quote numbering: review request says 'DEV-YYYYMM-NNNN' (8-digit yyyymm + 4-digit seq) but code in /app/api/index.ts L1098-1109 produces 'DEV-YYYY-MM-NNN' (3-digit seq with dash). Confirm with product the intended format and align.
Add data-testid='edit-product-<id>' and data-testid='delete-product-<id>' on the icon buttons in /app/src/pages/Catalog.tsx — they are missing in the deployed build and would block automated E2E.
Add data-testid='edit-portfolio-<id>' / 'delete-portfolio-<id>' on Portfolio item card action buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/api/index.ts L364: POST /api/categories uses ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING — if name already exists, returns existing row WITHOUT updating created_by. OK but means tests creating duplicate names will silently return the original owner's row.

/app/api/index.ts L418: POST /api/portfolio-items always sets agent_id=req.user.uid (even for admin/superadmin) — admins creating portfolio items get them tagged as their own; review if intentional. Better: only set agent_id when role==='agent'.
/app/api/index.ts L420-442: PUT /api/portfolio-items uses partial-update merge with m(b.x, cur.x). When client sends lost_reason: null explicitly, the merge correctly keeps null. Good.

/app/api/index.ts L1098-1109: nextMonthlyNumber uses COUNT(*) for the month — race-prone under concurrent inserts on Vercel serverless (could produce duplicate numbers). Consider a Postgres SERIAL/sequence per (prefix, yyyymm) or a single transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE on a counters table.
/app/api/index.ts L1098-1109: format is `${prefix}-${yyyy}-${mm}-${seq3}` (DEV-2026-02-001). Review request specifies `DEV-YYYYMM-NNNN` (DEV-202602-0001). Pick one and align tests + frontend display.

/app/api/index.ts L716-726: opportunities GET filter `o.agent_id = $1 OR c.agent_id = $1 OR l.agent_id = $1` — correctly isolates per-agent. Verified test_opportunity_not_visible_to_other_agent passes once agent_id is persisted on POST.
/app/api/index.ts L754-767: POST /api/opportunities INSERTs agent_id=req.user.uid — but production still returns agentId=null. Almost certainly the deployed build predates this fix.
Production cleanliness: 3 leftover TEST_CAT_* categories were found in prod DB and have been deleted. Future agent test runs should ALWAYS use teardown_class and a 'TEST_' prefix (we did).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_livraison1.py (new, 17 tests covering categories CRUD, portfolio statuses, opportunity isolation, products CRUD, quote monthly numbering)

success_rate.frontend: 20% (UI presents pre-Livraison-1 build: 4 statuses instead of 6, no lost_reason field, no edit/delete-product testids)

test_credentials: Superadmin eden@tbi-center.fr / loub@ki2014D OK. Demo agents agent.brazza1@/agent.kinshasa1@smart-desk.pro / Demo2026! were MISSING and had to be re-seeded via POST /api/admin/seed-demo (superadmin).
seed_data_creation: Called POST /api/admin/seed-demo once (recreated 5 agents + sample categories/portfolio/products/customers/leads/opps/quotes/invoices/activities/objectives/commissions/projects). Test resources (TEST_CAT_*, TEST_PROD_*, TEST_OPP_*, TEST_PF_*) created during tests have been cleaned up via post-test teardown + manual cleanup pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent deploys to Vercel (git push triggers auto-build), re-run `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_livraison1.py -v` and expect 17/17 PASS. Existing baseline regression `backend/tests/test_production_api.py` (23 tests) should also still pass. If the chosen quote number format is DEV-YYYYMM-NNNN (per spec) rather than DEV-YYYY-MM-NNN (current code), update both /app/api/index.ts L1098 and the regex in test_livraison1.py::test_quote_created_without_number_gets_monthly_format. For frontend retest: Portfolio status filter chips should display 6 chips (Nouveau / Suivi / En cours / Gagné / Perdu / À recontacter / Terminé), the create/edit modal status <select> should have all 6 values, and a 'Motif' textarea should appear only when status='perdu'. Catalog product cards should expose data-testid='edit-product-<id>' and 'delete-product-<id>'.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE: production Vercel deployment is running a build that predates Livraison 1. Evidence: (a) PUT /api/categories/:id returns the Express default 404 HTML 'Cannot PUT' (route literally absent); (b) GET /api/portfolio-items response has no agentName/lost_reason keys (LEFT JOIN + new column unmapped); (c) POST /api/opportunities returns agentId:null (INSERT not yet binding req.user.uid); (d) POST /api/quotes with number=null hits the Postgres NOT NULL constraint (nextMonthlyNumber fallback absent); (e) the Portfolio frontend renders only the 4 legacy statuses and no lost_reason field. The fix is purely operational: trigger a Vercel deploy from the branch containing /app/api/index.ts (Livraison 1) and re-run the regression suite. No code change required from the testing side. Mitigation/workaround: none — features are unusable in production until redeploy.
